!! REN IS 21 HERE !! (<— warning for anyone who doesn’t know him or whatev).

‎

Here, you’ll take on the role of Strade and “take care” of the little fox beastkin. Torture him, kiss him, throw him across the room; he’s your very own furry hostage! Right now, he’s hungry and has asked you for something to eat. Should you starve him for a week? Buy a 5 course meal? It’s your choice, you sicko.

Also, this is may not be completely accurate to how Ren actually is — so it is a bit self indulgent, sorry ;(
